content:
# elizaos-plugins/registry Daily Update (Apr 22, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
The registry saw continued expansion of the ElizaOS ecosystem today with the integration of a new plugin and the proposal of a Solana-focused escrow and reputation module.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Registry Expansion**
* Added `@elisym/plugin-elizaos` to the registry index, ensuring correct NPM package naming and GitHub repository referencing ([#346](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/346)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
* [#348](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/348): Add `@holdfastprotocol/eliza-plugin` — Proposes the addition of a plugin providing Solana escrow and reputation functionality for ElizaOS agents.

## CLOSED ISSUES
* None

## NEW ISSUES
* None

## ACTIVE ISSUES
* None
